message:
refactor: rename telemetry to history throughout codebase

The word "telemetry" has negative connotations suggesting remote data
collection and spying. Since dcg is a local-only tool with zero remote
data transmission, "history" is a more accurate and user-friendly term.

Changes:
- Renamed src/telemetry/ directory to src/history/
- Renamed all types: TelemetryDb → HistoryDb, TelemetryWriter → HistoryWriter, etc.
- Updated config section from [telemetry] to [history]
- Updated environment variables: DCG_TELEMETRY_* → DCG_HISTORY_*
- Updated CLI command from `dcg telemetry` to `dcg history`
- Renamed test files: telemetry_integration.rs → history_integration.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
